description_long: This is a medium-sized rectangular parcel wrapped in brown paper, sealed with red and white tape that features Cyrillic writing. The top surface displays a shipping label with handwritten and printed information, including barcodes and postal markings. The parcel is slightly compressed at the corners, suggesting it has been handled during transit. Blue printed patterns and logos, including the Belpost logo and website, are visible on the sides. The tape is prominently placed across the top and sides, reinforcing the package and providing a tamper-evident seal. The overall appearance is that of a securely packaged item ready for delivery, typical of international or domestic postal shipments.
description: A brown paper-wrapped parcel sealed with red and white tape, featuring postal labels, blue logos, and visible handling marks.
description_view_0: Front view shows the Belpost logo, blue decorative border, and red tape with Cyrillic text, along with the main shipping label on top.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the length of the parcel, the red tape running across, and the slightly crumpled paper at the corner.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the opposite side with similar blue logo and tape, and more visible wear on the paper edges.
description_view_3: Other side view shows the parcel's width, the continuation of the tape, and the brown paper wrapping with less visible labeling.
